---
title: "Emma Caroline Isabella Yonge"
---

## Emma Caroline Isabella Yonge

**Dates:** (1861-1917)

**Maiden name:** (Sherlock)

### Description

sister-in-law of [[person:1588]Charlotte Fortescue Yonge]

### Biography

She married (1883) [[person:2080]John Henry or Harry Yonge] (1852-1934), solicitor, son of CMY\'s first cousin the Rev. John Eyre Yonge.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
